'''vanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pinchedly|pinchedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pinchedly|pinchedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vanate|vanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vanatesher|vanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vanatesherĂ«m|vanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vanatero|vanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vanateshĂ«|vanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vanateshĂ«m|vanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivanatero|gokivanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivanateshĂ«|gokivanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivanateshĂ«m|gokivanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govanankerom|govanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govanankeshĂ«|govanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govanankeshĂ«m|govanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govanankeya|govanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vanaterom|vanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vanatemu|vanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vanateya|vanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivanaterom|gokivanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivanatemu|gokivanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivanateya|gokivanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vananate|vananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vananatesher|vananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vananatesherĂ«m|vananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vananatero|vananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vananateshĂ«|vananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vananateshĂ«m|vananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivananatero|gokivananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivananateshĂ«|gokivananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivananateshĂ«m|gokivananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govananankerom|govananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govananankeshĂ«|govananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govananankeshĂ«m|govananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govananankeya|govananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vananaterom|vananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vananatemu|vananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vananateya|vananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivananaterom|gokivananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivananatemu|gokivananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivananateya|gokivananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠte|vĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠtesher|vĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠtero|vĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠnĂŠtero|gokivĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠnĂŠnkerom|govĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠnĂŠnkeya|govĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠterom|vĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠtemu|vĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠnĂŠteya|vĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠnĂŠterom|gokivĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠnĂŠteya|gokivĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafnafte|vafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafnaftesher|vafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafnaftesherĂ«m|vafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafnaftero|vafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafnafteshĂ«|vafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafnafteshĂ«m|vafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafnaftero|gokivafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafnafteshĂ«|gokivafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafnafteshĂ«m|gokivafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafnafnkerom|govafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafnafnkeshĂ«|govafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafnafnkeshĂ«m|govafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafnafnkeya|govafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafnafterom|vafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafnaftemu|vafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafnafteya|vafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafnafterom|gokivafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafnaftemu|gokivafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafnafteya|gokivafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
